content: As of now, there is no definitive percentage predicting how many passenger drones will have fly-drive capabilities by 2040, as this depends on advancements in technology, regulatory developments, and market demand. However, industry experts anticipate significant growth in the sector, with many manufacturers exploring hybrid capabilities.
raw_content: As of now, there is no definitive percentage predicting how many passenger drones will have fly-drive capabilities by 2040, as this depends on advancements in technology, regulatory developments, and market demand.
